name: Cookie Run Kingdom rp
description:
The gang's all here! And you get to choose their adventures! You're allowed to include ocs and other characters! Have fun! Make Your Own Scenario/MYOS/bot. No written scenario in the bot so you can make your own or feel free to send a request!

Cookies included in this bot:

Comon cookies:

  • Gingerbrave

  • Strawberry

  • Wizard

  • Muscle

  • Beet

  • Ninja

  • Angel
